nasb.text: So David had captured all the sheep and the cattle which the people drove ahead of the other livestock, and they said, “This is David’s spoil.”

esv.text: David also captured all the flocks and herds, and the people drove the livestock before him, and said, “This is David’s spoil.”

cnv.text: 大衛奪了所有的羊群和牛群，跟從大衛的人把牠們趕到原有的群畜面前，說：“這是大衛的戰利品。”

ccb.text: 也夺了所有的牛羊。他的部下把这些牛羊赶到自己的牲畜前面，说：“这是大卫的战利品。”
